prestazioni: Engine: 2.7L twin-turbo V6 (engine code: BCY) with a custom Stage 3+ ECU remap by MTM (Micro-Tuning-Motorsport), targeting 550 HP and 520 lb-ft torque via upgraded fuel system (Bosch Motorsport 0280158030 injectors) and Garrett GT2867 .82 A/R turbochargers with billet compressor wheels

Drivetrain: Quattro GmbH RS4-spec rear-biased 60/40 torque split differential with a Wavetrac helical limited-slip differential (LSD) and upgraded driveshafts from 034 Motorsport (22mm solid steel, heat-treated)

Suspension: KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers (3-way adjustable, 800 lb/in front springs, 900 lb/in rear springs) with spherical bearing top mounts from 034 Motorsport and polybushings for subframe reinforcement, paired with H&R 25mm front and 20mm rear sway bars
estetica: Exterior: Full Nogaro Blue (LZ7Z) respray with a custom Audi Sport-inspired widebody kit by Prior Design (PD800RS4), featuring carbon fiber front fenders, extended rear quarter panels, and a functional rear diffuser with integrated twin exhaust cutouts

Wheels: OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT 19x9.5 ET25 (front) and 19x11 ET30 (rear) in matte gold, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/30/19 front, 295/30/19 rear) with custom center caps featuring the Nogaro Edition crest

Interior: Full carbon fiber trim by VMR (door cards, center console, and dashboard inserts) with Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber shell, Alcantara/leather upholstery in Nogaro Blue stitching) and a custom MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (flat-bottom, suede grip, RS4 Nogaro Edition embroidery)
